creator: xaero@xaerolimit.net
text:
gnome-libtool: link: cc -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -march=native -Werror-implicit-function-declaration -o orbit-idl-2 orbit-idl-main.o orbit-idl-driver.o orbit-idl-
backend.o orbit-idl-utils.o orbit-idl-c-backend.o orbit-idl-c-stubs.o orbit-idl-c-skels.o orbit-idl-c-headers.o orbit-idl-c-common.o orbit-idl-c-imodule.o orbit-idl-c-s
kelimpl.o orbit-idl-c-utils.o orbit-idl-c-typecode.o orbit-idl-c-deps.o -pthread -Wl,--export-dynamic  -L/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libIDL-2.so /usr/local/lib/libgob
ject-2.0.so /usr/local/lib/libgthread-2.0.so /usr/local/lib/libgmodule-2.0.so /usr/local/lib/libglib-2.0.so -licui18n /usr/local/lib/libintl.so /usr/local/lib/libiconv.
so /usr/local/lib/libpcre.so -lm -pthread -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib

===>>> make failed for devel/ORBit2
===>>> Aborting update

===>>> Update for devel/ORBit2 failed
===>>> Aborting update

Fix: 

portmaster devel/libIDL && portmaster devel/ORBit2 fixed the problem.
How-To-Repeat: 	Have very old versions of devel/libIDL and devel/ORBit2 (6 months or more) installed and try to update. Should faile as above.
